briefdescription.para: Size of NIST P-256 curve in bytes.
2 * Size of NIST P-256 curve in bytes
To notify the call back from client library.
Status variable to store the error returned from server.
Call back function which will be registered with library to notify the completion of request.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the call back reference.

Status of the request will be passed as an argument during callback
0 Upon success
Error code from ASUFW application upon any error

briefdescription.para: This function is to perform the generate signature operation.
This function is to perform the verify signature operation.
This function is to perform the generate public key operation.

inbodydescription.para: Compare the generated public key with the expected.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the XAsu_EccGenSign() and XAsu_EccVerifySign() API's.
